title: lyperia antirrhinoides
intro: Lyperia antirrhinoides, also known as the Antirrhinum or Dragon's Mouth, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which help in relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of Lyperia antirrhinoides include its ability to soothe bronchitis, reduce fever, and alleviate stress. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
